---
name: sync-test-plan
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

Review the TEST_PLAN and verify that it matches the current implemented tests. If there are any discrepancies, update the TEST_PLAN to reflect the current state of the tests. This includes adding any new tests that have been implemented and removing any tests that have been deprecated or are no longer relevant. Ensure that the TEST_PLAN is comprehensive and accurately represents the testing strategy for the project.
